CREATE DATABASE laptops;
USE laptops;

-- Check total number of rows
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM laptopdata;

-- Preview data with row numbers (read only, no table change)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS `index`,
    laptopdata.*
FROM laptopdata;

-- Drop auto-generated index column from CSV import
ALTER TABLE laptopdata DROP COLUMN `Unnamed: 0`;

-- Add index column at first position
ALTER TABLE laptopdata ADD COLUMN `index` INT FIRST;

-- Populate index using variable (guaranteed unique per row)
UPDATE laptopdata
SET `index` = (@row := @row + 1)
WHERE (@row := 0) = 0 OR TRUE;

-- Remove all rows where ANY column has a NULL value
DELETE FROM laptopdata
WHERE Company IS NULL
   OR TypeName IS NULL
   OR Inches IS NULL
   OR ScreenResolution IS NULL
   OR Cpu IS NULL
   OR Ram IS NULL
   OR Memory IS NULL
   OR Gpu IS NULL
   OR OpSys IS NULL
   OR Weight IS NULL
   OR Price IS NULL;

-- Verify null removal (should return 0)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM laptopdata
WHERE Company IS NULL
   OR TypeName IS NULL
   OR Inches IS NULL
   OR Price IS NULL;

-- Add truly unique primary key for duplicate detection
ALTER TABLE laptopdata ADD COLUMN uid INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY;

-- Delete duplicates keeping lowest uid (first occurrence)
DELETE FROM laptopdata
WHERE uid NOT IN (
    SELECT * FROM (
        SELECT MIN(uid)
        FROM laptopdata
        GROUP BY Company, TypeName, Inches, ScreenResolution,
                 Cpu, Ram, Memory, Gpu, OpSys, Weight, Price
    ) AS keep_rows
);

-- Drop helper column after duplicate removal
ALTER TABLE laptopdata DROP COLUMN uid;

-- Verify no duplicates remain (should return empty)
SELECT Company, TypeName, Inches, Price,
    COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count
FROM laptopdata
GROUP BY Company, TypeName, Inches, ScreenResolution,
         Cpu, Ram, Memory, Gpu, OpSys, Weight, Price
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

-- Remove 'GB' text and convert to integer
UPDATE laptopdata SET Ram = REPLACE(Ram, 'GB', '');
ALTER TABLE laptopdata MODIFY COLUMN Ram INT;

-- Remove 'kg' text
UPDATE laptopdata SET Weight = REPLACE(Weight, 'kg', '');

-- Set invalid '?' value to NULL
UPDATE laptopdata SET Weight = NULL WHERE Weight = '?';

-- Convert to decimal
ALTER TABLE laptopdata MODIFY COLUMN Weight DECIMAL(10,2);

-- Round and convert to integer
UPDATE laptopdata SET Price = ROUND(Price);
ALTER TABLE laptopdata MODIFY COLUMN Price INT;

-- Categorise into clean groups
UPDATE laptopdata
SET OpSys = CASE
    WHEN OpSys LIKE '%Windows%' THEN 'Windows'
    WHEN OpSys LIKE '%macOS%'   THEN 'macOS'
    WHEN OpSys LIKE '%Mac OS X%'THEN 'macOS'
    WHEN OpSys LIKE '%Linux%'   THEN 'Linux'
    WHEN OpSys LIKE '%Chrome%'  THEN 'Chrome OS'
    WHEN OpSys LIKE '%Android%' THEN 'Android'
    WHEN OpSys LIKE '%No OS%'   THEN 'No OS'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
END;

-- Categorise into brands
UPDATE laptopdata
SET Gpu = CASE
    WHEN Gpu LIKE '%Nvidia%' THEN 'Nvidia'
    WHEN Gpu LIKE '%AMD%'    THEN 'AMD'
    WHEN Gpu LIKE '%Intel%'  THEN 'Intel'
    WHEN Gpu LIKE '%ARM%'    THEN 'ARM'
    ELSE 'Other'
END;

-- Add storage columns
ALTER TABLE laptopdata
ADD COLUMN storage_type VARCHAR(10),
ADD COLUMN primary_storage INT,
ADD COLUMN secondary_storage INT;

-- Classify storage type
UPDATE laptopdata SET storage_type = CASE
    WHEN Memory LIKE '%SSD%'    AND Memory NOT LIKE '%HDD%'    AND Memory NOT LIKE '%Hybrid%' THEN 'SSD'
    WHEN Memory LIKE '%HDD%'    AND Memory NOT LIKE '%SSD%'    AND Memory NOT LIKE '%Hybrid%' THEN 'HDD'
    WHEN Memory LIKE '%Flash%'                                                                THEN 'SSD'
    WHEN Memory LIKE '%Hybrid%'                                                               THEN 'Hybrid'
    WHEN Memory LIKE '%SSD%'    AND Memory LIKE '%HDD%'                                       THEN 'Hybrid'
    WHEN Memory = '?'                                                                         THEN NULL
    ELSE 'Other'
END;

-- Extract primary storage (before '+'), handle '?' safely
UPDATE laptopdata
SET primary_storage = CASE
    WHEN Memory = '?' OR Memory IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(Memory, '+', 1), '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED)
END;

-- Extract secondary storage (after '+'), handle '?' safely
UPDATE laptopdata
SET secondary_storage = CASE
    WHEN Memory NOT LIKE '%+%'          THEN NULL
    WHEN Memory = '?' OR Memory IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(Memory, '+', -1), '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED)
END;

-- Convert TB to GB for primary storage
UPDATE laptopdata
SET primary_storage = CASE
    WHEN Memory LIKE '%TB%' AND Memory NOT LIKE '%+%' THEN primary_storage * 1024
    ELSE primary_storage
END;

-- Convert TB to GB for secondary storage
UPDATE laptopdata
SET secondary_storage = CASE
    WHEN Memory LIKE '%+%' AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(Memory, '+', -1) LIKE '%TB%' THEN secondary_storage * 1024
    ELSE secondary_storage
END;

-- Drop original Memory column
ALTER TABLE laptopdata DROP COLUMN Memory;

-- Add CPU columns
ALTER TABLE laptopdata
ADD COLUMN cpu_brand VARCHAR(10),
ADD COLUMN cpu_model VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN cpu_speed DECIMAL(10,2);

-- Extract brand
UPDATE laptopdata
SET cpu_brand = CASE
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Intel%'   THEN 'Intel'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%AMD%'     THEN 'AMD'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Samsung%' THEN 'Samsung'
    ELSE 'Other'
END;

-- Extract CPU model
UPDATE laptopdata
SET cpu_model = CASE
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Core i3%'    THEN 'Core i3'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Core i5%'    THEN 'Core i5'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Core i7%'    THEN 'Core i7'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Core M%'     THEN 'Core M'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Celeron%'    THEN 'Celeron'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Pentium%'    THEN 'Pentium'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Atom%'       THEN 'Atom'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Xeon%'       THEN 'Xeon'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Ryzen%'      THEN 'Ryzen'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%A4-Series%'  THEN 'A4-Series'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%A6-Series%'  THEN 'A6-Series'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%A8-Series%'  THEN 'A8-Series'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%A9-Series%'  THEN 'A9-Series'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%A10-Series%' THEN 'A10-Series'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%A12-Series%' THEN 'A12-Series'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%E-Series%'   THEN 'E-Series'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%FX%'         THEN 'FX'
    WHEN Cpu LIKE '%Cortex%'     THEN 'Cortex'
    ELSE 'Other'
END;

-- Extract CPU speed (GHz number)
UPDATE laptopdata
SET cpu_speed = CAST(
    REGEXP_SUBSTR(Cpu, '[0-9]+\\.?[0-9]*(?=GHz)')
AS DECIMAL(10,2));

-- Drop original Cpu column
ALTER TABLE laptopdata DROP COLUMN Cpu;

-- Add screen columns
ALTER TABLE laptopdata
ADD COLUMN touchscreen INT,
ADD COLUMN resolution_width INT,
ADD COLUMN resolution_height INT,
ADD COLUMN screen_type VARCHAR(20);

-- Touchscreen flag (1 or 0)
UPDATE laptopdata
SET touchscreen = CASE
    WHEN ScreenResolution LIKE '%Touchscreen%' THEN 1
    ELSE 0
END;

-- Extract resolution width (before 'x')
UPDATE laptopdata
SET resolution_width = CAST(
    REGEXP_SUBSTR(ScreenResolution, '[0-9]+(?=x[0-9])')
AS UNSIGNED);

-- Extract resolution height (after 'x')
UPDATE laptopdata
SET resolution_height = CAST(
    REGEXP_SUBSTR(ScreenResolution, '(?<=x)[0-9]+')
AS UNSIGNED);

-- Classify screen type
UPDATE laptopdata
SET screen_type = CASE
    WHEN ScreenResolution LIKE '%IPS%' AND ScreenResolution LIKE '%4K%'     THEN 'IPS 4K'
    WHEN ScreenResolution LIKE '%IPS%' AND ScreenResolution LIKE '%Quad HD%' THEN 'IPS Quad HD'
    WHEN ScreenResolution LIKE '%IPS%' AND ScreenResolution LIKE '%Retina%'  THEN 'IPS Retina'
    WHEN ScreenResolution LIKE '%IPS%' AND ScreenResolution LIKE '%Full HD%' THEN 'IPS Full HD'
    WHEN ScreenResolution LIKE '%IPS%'                                       THEN 'IPS'
    WHEN ScreenResolution LIKE '%4K%'                                        THEN '4K'
    WHEN ScreenResolution LIKE '%Quad HD%'                                   THEN 'Quad HD'
    WHEN ScreenResolution LIKE '%Full HD%'                                   THEN 'Full HD'
    ELSE 'Standard'
END;

-- Drop original ScreenResolution column
ALTER TABLE laptopdata DROP COLUMN ScreenResolution;

-- Reset index with unique sequential values
UPDATE laptopdata
SET `index` = (@row := @row + 1)
WHERE (@row := 0) = 0 OR TRUE;

-- Set correct data types and reorder all columns
ALTER TABLE laptopdata
    MODIFY COLUMN `index`            INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY FIRST,
    MODIFY COLUMN Company            VARCHAR(50)       AFTER `index`,
    MODIFY COLUMN TypeName           VARCHAR(50)       AFTER Company,
    MODIFY COLUMN Inches             DECIMAL(4,1)      AFTER TypeName,
    MODIFY COLUMN screen_type        VARCHAR(20)       AFTER Inches,
    MODIFY COLUMN resolution_width   SMALLINT UNSIGNED AFTER screen_type,
    MODIFY COLUMN resolution_height  SMALLINT UNSIGNED AFTER resolution_width,
    MODIFY COLUMN touchscreen        TINYINT(1)        AFTER resolution_height,
    MODIFY COLUMN cpu_brand          VARCHAR(10)       AFTER touchscreen,
    MODIFY COLUMN cpu_model          VARCHAR(20)       AFTER cpu_brand,
    MODIFY COLUMN cpu_speed          DECIMAL(3,1)      AFTER cpu_model,
    MODIFY COLUMN Ram                TINYINT UNSIGNED  AFTER cpu_speed,
    MODIFY COLUMN Gpu                VARCHAR(20)       AFTER Ram,
    MODIFY COLUMN storage_type       VARCHAR(10)       AFTER Gpu,
    MODIFY COLUMN primary_storage    SMALLINT UNSIGNED AFTER storage_type,
    MODIFY COLUMN secondary_storage  SMALLINT UNSIGNED AFTER primary_storage,
    MODIFY COLUMN OpSys              VARCHAR(20)       AFTER secondary_storage,
    MODIFY COLUMN Weight             DECIMAL(4,2)      AFTER OpSys,
    MODIFY COLUMN Price              FLOAT             AFTER Weight;

DESCRIBE laptopdata;
SELECT * FROM laptopdata LIMIT 5;
